 --client-certificate=/opt/kubernetes/server/bin/certs/kube-proxy-client.pem \
 --client-key=/opt/kubernetes/server/bin/certs/kube-proxy-client-key.pem \
 --embed-certs=true \
 --kubeconfig=kube-proxy.kubeconfig 1kubectl config set-context myk8s-context \
 --cluster=myk8s \
 --user=kube-proxy \
 --kubeconfig=kube-proxy.kubeconfig 1kubectl config use-context myk8s-context --kubeconfig=kube-proxy.kubeconfig 加载ipvs模块 k8s流量调度的机制 1vim /root/ipvs.sh 
#!/bin/bash
ipvs_mods_dir="/usr/lib/modules/$(uname -r)/kernel/net/netfilter/ipvs"
for i in $(ls $ipvs_mods_dir|grep -o "^[^.]*")
do
/sbin/modinfo -F filename $i &>/dev/null
if [ $? -eq 0 ];then
 /sbin/modprobe $i
fi
done 1chmod +x /root/ipvs.sh 
echo "/root/ipvs.sh" >> /etc/rc.local
chmod +x /etc/rc.local 1lsmod | grep ip_vs
ip_vs_wrr 16384 0 
.......
libcrc32c 16384 2 xfs,ip_vs 配置启动脚本 1vim /opt/kubernetes/server/bin/kube-proxy.sh 
#!/bin/sh
./kube-proxy \
 --cluster-cidr 172.7.0.0/16 \
 --hostname-override k8s-21.host.com \
 --proxy-mode=ipvs \
 --ipvs-scheduler=nq \
 --kubeconfig ./conf/kube-proxy.kubeconfig 创建运行需要的目录，以及配置权限 1mkdir -p /data/logs/kubernetes/kube-proxy
chmod +x /opt/kubernetes/server/bin/kube-proxy.sh supervisord 启动脚本 1vim /etc/supervisord.d/kube-proxy.ini
[program:kube-proxy-21]
command=/opt/kubernetes/server/bin/kube-proxy.sh ; the program (relative uses PATH, can take args)
numprocs=1 ; number of processes copies to start (def 1)
directory=/opt/kubernetes/server/bin ; directory to cwd to before exec (def no cwd)
autostart=true ; start at supervisord start (default: true)
autorestart=true ; retstart at unexpected quit (default: true)
startsecs=30 ; number of secs prog must stay running (def. 1)
startretries=3 ; max # of serial start failures (default 3)
exitcodes=0,2 ; 'expected' exit codes for process (default 0,2)
stopsignal=QUIT ; signal used to kill process (default TERM)
stopwaitsecs=10 ; max num secs to wait b4 SIGKILL (default 10)
user=root ; setuid to this UNIX account to run the program
redirect_stderr=true ; redirect proc stderr to stdout (default false)
stdout_logfile=/data/logs/kubernetes/kube-proxy/proxy.stdout.log ; stderr log path, NONE for none; default AUTO
stdout_logfile_maxbytes=64MB ; max # logfile bytes b4 rotation (default 50MB)
stdout_logfile_backups=4 ; # of stdout logfile backups (default 10)
stdout_capture_maxbytes=1MB ; number of bytes in 'capturemode' (default 0)
stdout_events_enabled=false ; emit events on stdout writes (default false)
stopasgroup=true
killasgroup=true 启动 1supervisorctl update 
supervisorctl status 
etcd-server-22 RUNNING pid 15935, uptime 13:38:24
kube-apiserver-22 RUNNING pid 19337, uptime 12:31:28
kube-controller-manager-22 RUNNING pid 23350, uptime 0:46:33
kube-kubelet-22 RUNNING pid 24036, uptime 0:33:47
kube-proxy-22 RUNNING pid 32132, uptime 0:01:19
kube-scheduler-22 RUNNING pid 18900, uptime 2:14:24 验证ipvs 1yum install ipvsadm -y 1kubectl get svc
NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE
kubernetes ClusterIP 10.254.0.1 <none> 443/TCP 12h 1ipvsadm -Ln
IP Virtual Server version 1.2.1 (size=4096)
Prot LocalAddress:Port Scheduler Flags
 -> RemoteAddress:Port Forward Weight ActiveConn InActConn
TCP 10.254.0.1:443 nq
 -> 10.10.10.21:6443 Masq 1 0 0 
 -> 10.10.10.22:6443 Masq 1 0 0 k8s 集群安装完成 验证K8s集群 使用配置清单下发任务 1cat > nginx-ds.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
 name: nginx-ds
spec:
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 app: nginx-ds
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: my-nginx
 image: harbor.od.com/public/nginx:1.7.9
 ports:
 - containerPort: 80
EOF 下发 1kubectl create -f nginx-ds.yaml

kubectl get pods
NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE
nginx-ds-5xdq8 1/1 Running 0 12s
nginx-ds-fc55n 1/1 Running 0 12s 访问启动的pod 1kubectl get pods -o wide
NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE IP NODE NOMINATED NODE READINESS GATES
nginx-ds-5xdq8 1/1 Running 0 56s 172.7.22.2 k8s-22.host.com <none> <none>
nginx-ds-fc55n 1/1 Running 0 56s 172.7.21.2 k8s-21.host.com <none> <none> 验证K8s全部组建的状态 1
[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get cs
NAME STATUS MESSAGE ERROR
scheduler Healthy ok 
controller-manager Healthy ok 
etcd-1 Healthy {"health": "true"} 
etcd-0 Healthy {"health": "true"} 
etcd-2 Healthy {"health": "true"} 
[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get nodes
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-21.host.com Ready master,node,test 56m v1.15.2
k8s-22.host.com Ready master,node 44m v1.15.2 1systemctl disable firewalld Minikube1234567minikube start \--registry-mirror=https://registry.docker-cn.com \--image-repository=registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/google_containers \--vm-driver=docker \--alsologtostderr \-v=8 \--base-image registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/google_containers/kicbase:v0.0.10

posts.title: Python 模块:re模块
posts.text: re模块正则匹配 匹配方法 说明 re.findall 返回一个存储所有匹配上的项的列表 1234ret = re.findall('\d‘, 'qwdqwd12d123e21232')print(ret)> ['1', '2', '1', '2', '3', '2', '1', '2', '3', '2'] 匹配方法 说明 re.search 返回正则匹配结果的对象地址 1234567ret2 = re.search('\d+','aw1234de123123de')if ret2: print(type(ret2)) print(ret2.group()) > <class 're.Match'>> 1234 匹配方法 说明 re.match 如果字符串开始的位置或者从开始就有多个字符匹配到了正则表达式,就返回一个相应的匹配对象,不然就找不到 123456ret3 = re.match('\d+','aw1234de123123de')print(ret3)print(ret3.group())> None> AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'group' 正则替换 正则替换 说明 re.sub re.subn 返回一个set, set[0]是替换的结果, set[1]是替换的次数 1234567891011121314151617str1 = '123qwe1212ewq32.23fcwe12d12'ret1 = re.sub('[a-z]','-',str1)print(ret1)> 123---1212---32.23----12-12ret1 = re.subn('[a-z]','-',str1)print(ret1)('123-we1212ewq32.23fcwe12d12', 1)> ('123---1212---32.23----12-12', 11)# 和字符串 replace一样,sub和sub也支持在最后面定义替换的个数ret1 = re.subn('[a-z]','-',str1,2)print(ret1)> ('123--e1212ewq32.23fcwe12d12', 2) 正则切割 正则切割 说明 re.split 1234ret2 = re.split('\d+','123qwe1212ewq32.23fcwe12d12')print(ret2)> ['', 'qwe', 'ewq', '.', 'fcwe', 'd', ''] RE进阶正则表达式也是一种语法, 我们写的正则也是需要被编译后才能被Python解释器所理解运行, 当需要重复使用同一条规则时可以使用re.compile 预编译好正则表达式赋予一个变量,这样使用的时候直接拿过来用, 一定程度上能够节省代码运行的时间效率 进阶 说明 re.compile 预编译一条正则表达式 123456ret = re.compile('\d+\.?\d+')print(ret.findall('qwdqwd2.123dwqed112.3'))print(ret.findall('1.123,qwd13123.12qwe23.13'))> ['2.123', '112.3']> ['1.123', '13123.12', '23.13'] 在python通常会用iter() 把列表等数据类型创建一个迭代器对象next()可以依次取出迭代器中的元素 这样做的好处是: 使用迭代器可以调用出列表中的所有元素, 并且列表里面的所有元素不需要在同一时间加载到内存中, 需要用的时候加载即可, 一定程度上节省服务器的内存提高空间效率 re模块中也有同样功能的方法, 进阶 说明 re.finditer 把正则表达式匹配结果的对象以一个迭代器的方式返回 1234567891011ret1 = re.finditer('\d+','qwe12eqw45151e21125e1125e14215e')print(ret1)for i in ret1: print(i.group()) > <callable_iterator object at 0x02D9F890>> 12> 45151> 21125> 1125> 14215 re中的正则分组 属于正则表达式在Python中的一些特殊的方法 findall 分组优先在findall中的正则表达式分组匹配的结果将会被优先显示, 即使是空 12345678910ret = re.findall('www.baidu.com|www.taobao.com','www.baidu.com')ret1 = re.findall('www.(baidu|taobao).com','www.baidu.com')ret2 = re.findall('[a-z](\d?)','abcd')print('ret',ret)print('ret1',ret1)print('ret2',ret2)> ret ['www.baidu.com']> ret1 ['baidu']> ret2 ['', '', '', ''] 取消findall分组优先 12345678ret1 = re.findall('www.(?:baidu|taobao).com','www.baidu.com')ret2 = re.findall('[a-z](?:\d?)','abcd')print('ret1',ret1)print('ret2',ret2)> ret1 ['www.baidu.com']> ret2 ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd'] 同样适用于 re.compile search + 分组search也遵循分组优先的原则, 不同于findall的是, search 需要使用.group() 触发,并且可以指定输出哪一个表达式分组匹配到的内容 123456789101112131415161718ret = re.search('\d+(.\d+)(.\d+)(.\d+)','1.2.3.4-2*(60+(-40.35/5)-(-4*3))')print(ret.group())print(ret.group(1))print(ret.group(2))ret1 = re.search('(\w{0,3})(\d?)(\d+)','abc123456')print(ret1.group(0))print(ret1.group(1))print(ret1.group(2))print(ret1.group(3))> 1.2.3.4> .2> .3> abc123456> abc> 1> 23456 split + 分组 当split中的正则有分组，那么就会显示分组中切割消失的值 1234ret = re.split('(\d+)','qwd123d1e12edd123eww21ed1')print(ret)> ['qwd', '123', 'd', '1', 'e', '12', 'edd', '123', 'eww', '21', 'ed', '1', ''] 分组命名命名方式: 在分组内添加?P<name> 命名 调用方式: 在分组内使用?P=name PS: 调用的分组内的正则表达式, 然后对吧分组内正则表达式匹配的值是否相等, 12345678ret = re.search(r'<(?P<gname>\w)>\w+</(?P=gname)>','<a>abc</a>')print(ret.group(1))ret1 = re.search(r'<(?P<gname>\w)>\w+</(?P=gname)>','<a>abc</b>')print(ret1)> a> None 索引分组123ret1 = re.search(r'<(\w)>\w+</(\1)>','<a>abc</a>')print(ret1.group(1))> a 练习12345678910111213141516171819#1-2*(60+(-40.35/5)-(-4*3)) 匹配所有整数and浮点数,但是不显示浮点数ret = re.findall('(?:\d+\.\d+)|(\d+)','1-2*(60+(-40.35/5)-(-4*3))')print(ret)> ['1', '2', '60', '', '5', '4', '3']# <a>abc</a> 匹配字符串中的<>中的a & 匹配字符串中的二个<>中间的值：abcret = re.findall(r'<(\w)>',r'<a>abc</a>')ret1 = re.findall(r'>(\w+)<',r'<a>abc</a>')print('ret:', ret)print('ret1:',ret1)ret_ = re.search('<(\w+)>(\w+)<(/\w+)>','<a>abc</a>')print('ret_:',ret_.group(1))print('ret_:',ret_.group(2))> ret: ['a']> ret1: ['abc']> ret_: a> ret_: abc flags方法1234ret = re.findall('[a-z]','DQW!@FCQDdqwdfcq',re.I)print(ret)> ['D', 'Q', 'W', 'F', 'C', 'Q', 'D', 'd', 'q', 'w', 'd', 'f', 'c', 'q'] flags方法 说明 re.I 忽略大小写,完整写法:IGNORECASE re.M 忽略换行符，多行模式，改变^跟$的行为，完整的写法：MULTILINE re.S 让.字符可以匹配任意字符，包括换行符，完整的写法：DOTALL re.L 表示特殊字符集 \w, \W, \b, \B, \s, \S 依赖于当前环境，不推荐使用，完整的写法：LOCALE re.U 使用\w \W \s \S \d \D使用取决于unicode定义的字符属性。在python3中默认使用该flag，完整的写法：UNICODE re.X 冗长模式，该模式下pattern字符串可以是多行的，忽略空白字符，并可以添加注释，完整的写法：VERBOSE

posts.title: Kubernetes 管理k8s
posts.text:
资源管理管理k8s核心资源的三种方法 陈述式管理—主要依赖命令行CLI工具进行管理 声明式管理—主要以来统一资源配置清单（manifest）进行管理 GUI式管理—主要依赖图形化操作界面（web界面 dashborad）进行管理 陈述式资源管理namespace 名称空间1kubectl get namespace/ns

namespace		获取k8s中的名称空间， ns简写 1kubectl get all [ -n namespace ] 

all 	获取名称空间中的全部资源
-n 	指定名称空间, 不指定默认是default名称空间 1kubectl create namespace	app

app		创建一个名为app的名称空间 1kubectl delete namespace	app

app		删除名为app的名称空间 pod/pod控制器 管理 新建一个名为 nginx-web的 pod控制器 1kubectl create deployment nginx-web --image=harbor.od.com/public/nginx:1.7.9 -n kube-public

create			创建pod控制器
deployment		指定使用 deployment pod控制器
nginx-web		pod控制器的name
--image=		其中pod使用的镜像
-n				指定名称空间 需要区分pod和pod控制器，这里创建的就是一个pod控制器，相当于是pod的剧本， pod控制器会按照剧本内容拉起pod 删除名为nginx-web-548f4f9d8d-q4j9b的pod 1kubectl delete pod nginx-web-548f4f9d8d-q4j9b	-n kube-public 删除了pod，pod控制器会立刻从新按照剧本拉起新的pod，所以对pod的删除相当于是重启pod 删除指定控制器，同样旗下的所以pod也会被一并销毁 1kubectl delete deployment nginx-test -n kube-public [--force	--grace-period=0]

deployment	指定控制器类型
nginx-test	指定控制器名字
--force	--grace-period=0	强制删除pod 扩容/减少pod数量 123kubectl scale deployment nginx-web --replicas=5 -n kube-public--replicas 指定pod总数 查询pod控制器信息 1kubectl describe/get deployment nginx-web -n kube-public

describe		详细查看
get				简单查看 查询pod信息 1kubectl describe/get pod nginx-web-548f4f9d8d-pg5fb -n kube-public 1kubectl get pod nginx-web-548f4f9d8d-pg5fb -n kube-public -o wide

-o wide		显示pod的ip 进入pod 1kubectl exec -it nginx-ds-cf468 /bin/bash service 管理 创建svc 1kubectl expose deployment nginx-web --port=80 -n kube-public 查询svc 1kubectl get service/svc
kubectl describe svc nginx-web -n kube-public 删除svc 1kubectl delete svc nginx-test kubernet集群管理资源的唯一入口就是通过相应的方法调用apiserver的接口 kubectl 是k8s官方提供的CLI工具，用于和apiserver进行通讯，用户输入的命令会转化为apiserver能识别的信息 kubectl 命令查询http://docs.kubernetes.org.cn/683.html 声明式管理 查看资源配置清单 1kubectl get deployment nginx-web -n kube-public -o yaml 资源配置清单必要的4个字段 1apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
	
spec: 解释配置清单字段 1kubectl explain	service.apiVersion

解释apiVersion字段的可选参数和意义 使用配置清单创建任务 1cat > nginx-ds.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
 name: nginx-ds
spec:
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 app: nginx-ds
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: my-nginx
 image: harbor.od.com/public/nginx:1.7.9
 ports:
 - containerPort: 80
EOF 1kubectl create -f nginx-ds.yaml -n kube-public 修改配置清单内容 在线修改 1kubectl edit service nginx-ds -n kube-public

修改service资源配置清单 1kubectl edit deployment nginx-ds -n kube-public

修改pod控制器资源配置清单 离线修改 123kubectl apply -f nginx-ds.yaml 直接修改配置清单文件，然后使用apply让其生效 删除资源配置清单生成的资源 1kubectl delete -f file.yaml k8s平滑升级 将当前2台节点的k8s平滑升级到 v1.15.4 1[root@k8s-21 conf]# kubectl get nodes
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-21.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2
k8s-22.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2 准备软件包 12345678cd /opt/srcwget https://dl.k8s.io/v1.15.4/kubernetes-server-linux-amd64.tar.gzmv kubernetes-server-linux-amd64.tar.gz kubernetes-server-v1.15.4-linux-amd64.tar.gzmkdir tmpdirtar -xf kubernetes-server-v1.15.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz -C tmpdir/ 123456789101112[root@k8s-21 src]# tree tmpdir/tmpdir/`-- kubernetes |-- LICENSES |-- addons |-- kubernetes-src.tar.gz `-- server `-- bin |-- apiextensions-apiserver .......................... .......................... `-- mounter 1cp -a tmpdir/kubernetes /opt/kubernetes-v1.15.4 准备新版本的kubernetes 1cd /opt/kubernetes-v1.18.4
rm -rf kubernetes-src.tar.gz

cd server/bin/
rm -rf *.tar
rm -rf *_tag

cp -a /opt/kubernetes/server/bin/conf /opt/kubernetes/server/bin/certs /opt/kubernetes/server/bin/*.sh . 从k8s中剔除要升级的节点 1[root@k8s-21 conf]# kubectl get nodes
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-21.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2
k8s-22.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2

[root@k8s-21 conf]# kubectl delete nodes k8s-21.host.com
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-21.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2
k8s-22.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2

[root@k8s-21 conf]# kubectl get nodes
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-22.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2 从集群中删除一个 节点时，k8s内部会自动将该节点的任务调度到其他节点上去 强制覆盖旧版本的软连接 1ln -sfn /opt/kubernetes-v1.15.4 /opt/kubernetes 重启 k8s 1supervisorctl stop all
ps aux | grep kube

supervisorctl start all 如果有错误需要手动处理，问题基本上都是supervisor没有杀掉旧的进程影响的 检查新版本的运行状态 12345678[root@k8s-21 supervisord.d]# supervisorctl statusetcd-server-21 RUNNING pid 26389, uptime 0:03:33flanneld-21 RUNNING pid 27499, uptime 0:02:08kube-apiserver-21 RUNNING pid 26391, uptime 0:03:33kube-controller-manager-21 RUNNING pid 26392, uptime 0:03:33kube-kubelet-21 RUNNING pid 27904, uptime 0:01:01kube-proxy-21 RUNNING pid 26388, uptime 0:03:33kube-scheduler-21 RUNNING pid 26404, uptime 0:03:33 1[root@k8s-21 supervisord.d]# kubectl get nodes
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-21.host.com Ready <none> 13m v1.15.4
k8s-22.host.com Ready master,node 5d12h v1.15.2 k8s-22 升级也是同理 1[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get nodes
NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION
k8s-21.host.com Ready <none> 50m v1.15.4
k8s-22.host.com Ready <none> 34s v1.15.4 k8s 人为调度污点 taint1kubectl taint node k8s-21.host.com disk=hdd:NoExecute 1kubectl taint node k8s-21.host.com disk-

删除一个污点 容忍污点1cat nginx-dp.yaml 
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
 labels:
 app: nginx-dp
 name: nginx-dp
 namespace: kube-public
spec:
 replicas: 2
 selector:
 matchLabels:
 app: nginx-dp
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 app: nginx-dp
 spec:
 tolerations:
 - key: disk
 value: hdd
 effect: NoExecute
 containers:
 - image: harbor.od.com/public/nginx:1.7.9
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 name: nginx 多个污点1kubectl taint node k8s-21.host.com hdd=:NoExecute
kubectl taint node k8s-21.host.com min_memory=:NoExecute 容忍多个污点1apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
 labels:
 app: nginx-dp
 name: nginx-dp
 namespace: kube-public
spec:
 replicas: 2
 selector:
 matchLabels:
 app: nginx-dp
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 app: nginx-dp
 spec:
 tolerations:
 - key: hdd
 - key: min_memory
 effect: NoExecute
 containers:
 - image: harbor.od.com/public/nginx:1.7.9
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 name: nginx 标签

posts.title: Kubernetes K8s的插件
posts.text:
安装flannel网络插件 k8s设计了网络模型，但却将他的实现交给了网络插件，CNI网络插件最主要的功能就是实现POD资源能够跨主机进行通信 最常见的CNI网络插件：Flannel、Calico、Cancl、OpenContrail、NSX-T、Kube-router 安装 flannel 使用ectd存储数据，因此需要在etcd中给flannel创建host-gw模型 1etcdctl set /coreos.com/network/config '{"Network": "172.7.0.0/16", "Backend": {"Type": "host-gw"}}' k8s-2 k8s-22 下载二进制软件包 1cd /opt/src
wget https://github.com/coreos/flannel/releases/download/v0.11.0/flannel-v0.11.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz

mkdir /opt/flannel-v0.11.0
tar -xf flannel-v0.11.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz -C /opt/flannel-v0.11.0/

ln -s /opt/flannel-v0.11.0 /opt/flannel

cd flannel 获取证书 flannel 使用etcd存储数据，因此需要和etcd通讯所使用的证书 1cd /opt/flannel
mkdir certs;cd certs

scp k8s-200.host.com:/opt/certs/ca.pem .
scp k8s-200.host.com:/opt/certs/client.pem .
scp k8s-200.host.com:/opt/certs/client-key.pem . 配置flannel 虚拟网段配置文件 1cd /opt/flannel/
vim subnet.env
FLANNEL_NETWORK=172.7.0.0/16 # 横跨K8s全部node节点docker虚拟c网段的 B类网段
FLANNEL_SUBNET=172.7.22.1/24 # 当前主机docker虚拟网段
FLANNEL_MTU=1500
FLANNEL_IPMASQ=false 配置启动脚本 1cd /opt/flannel/
vim flanneld.sh
#!/bin/sh
./flanneld \
 --public-ip=10.10.10.22 \	#当前宿主机ip
 --etcd-endpoints=https://10.10.10.12:2379,https://10.10.10.21:2379,https://10.10.10.22:2379 \
 --etcd-keyfile=./certs/client-key.pem \
 --etcd-certfile=./certs/client.pem \
 --etcd-cafile=./certs/ca.pem \
 --iface=eth0 \
 --subnet-file=./subnet.env \
 --healthz-port=2401 1chmod +x flanneld.sh 配置supervisord 1cat > /etc/supervisord.d/flanneld.ini <<-EOF
[program:flanneld-22]
command=/opt/flannel/flanneld.sh ; the program (relative uses PATH, can take args)
numprocs=1 ; number of processes copies to start (def 1)
directory=/opt/flannel ; directory to cwd to before exec (def no cwd)
autostart=true ; start at supervisord start (default: true)
autorestart=true ; retstart at unexpected quit (default: true)
startsecs=30 ; number of secs prog must stay running (def. 1)
startretries=3 ; max # of serial start failures (default 3)
exitcodes=0,2 ; 'expected' exit codes for process (default 0,2)
stopsignal=QUIT ; signal used to kill process (default TERM)
stopwaitsecs=10 ; max num secs to wait b4 SIGKILL (default 10)
user=root ; setuid to this UNIX account to run the program
redirect_stderr=true ; redirect proc stderr to stdout (default false)
stdout_logfile=/data/logs/flanneld/flanneld.stdout.log ; stderr log path, NONE for none; default AUTO
stdout_logfile_maxbytes=64MB ; max # logfile bytes b4 rotation (default 50MB)
stdout_logfile_backups=4 ; # of stdout logfile backups (default 10)
stdout_capture_maxbytes=1MB ; number of bytes in 'capturemode' (default 0)
stdout_events_enabled=false ; emit events on stdout writes (default false)
EOF flannel 网络模型 host-gw模型 VxLAN模型 “VxLAN”,”Directrouting” 直接路由模型 12'{"Network": "172.7.0.0/16", "Backend": {"Type": "VxLAN","Directrouting": true}}''{"Network": "172.7.0.0/16", "Backend": {"Type": "VxLAN"}}' flannel 切换模型的方式就是 关闭flannel的进程 然后 使用 etcd set 切换模型，然后再启动flannel 优化iptables nat规则 k8s-21 k8s-22 关闭 iptables对于集群内部 的地址转换 1yum install iptables-services -y 

systemctl start iptables 
systemctl enable iptables 1iptables-save | grep -i postrouting
-A POSTROUTING -s 172.7.21.0/24 ! -o docker0 -j MASQUERADE 1iptables -t nat -D POSTROUTING -s 172.7.21.0/24 ! -o docker0 -j MASQUERADE
iptables -t nat -I POSTROUTING -s 172.7.21.0/24 ! -d 172.7.0.0/16 ! -o docker0 -j MASQUERADE

172.7.21.0/24	本地docker的虚拟网段
172.7.0.0/16	flannel上的c 1iptables -t filter -D INPUT -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-host-prohibited
iptables -t filter -D FORWARD -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-host-prohibited 1iptables-save > /etc/sysconfig/iptables 1cat >> /etc/rc.local <<-EOF
iptables -t nat -D POSTROUTING -s 172.7.`cat /tmp/I_P`.0/24 ! -o docker0 -j MASQUERADE
iptables -t nat -I POSTROUTING -s 172.7.`cat /tmp/I_P`.0/24 ! -d 172.7.0.0/16 -o docker0 -j MASQUERADE
EOF

chmod +x /etc/rc.local CoreDNSCoreDNS 是为了维护 服务名 和集群网络IP之间的关系 简单点来说 就是吧 service 解析到一个对应的 服务上，以便管理员更加方便的访问 例如 123456[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get svc -n kube-publicNAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGEnginx-ds ClusterIP 10.254.0.229 <none> 80/TCP 11h将nginx-ds svc解析为 nginx-ds.kube-public.svc.cluster.local 这个域 上 部署coredns 建议在 200上的nginx上创建一个统一 yaml 管理站点 1234567891011server { listen 80; server_name k8s-yaml.od.com; location / { autoindex on; default_type text/plain; root /data/k8s-yaml; }} 准备镜像 coredns 资源配置清单 1mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/coredns;cd /data/k8s-yaml/coredns 1cat > coredns-rbac-cm.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 name: coredns
 namespace: kube-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
 labels:
 kubernetes.io/bootstrapping: rbac-defaults
 name: system:coredns
rules:
- apiGroups:
 - ""
 resources:
 - endpoints
 - services
 - pods
 - namespaces
 verbs:
 - list
 - watch
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
 annotations:
 rbac.authorization.kubernetes.io/autoupdate: "true"
 labels:
 kubernetes.io/bootstrapping: rbac-defaults
 name: system:coredns
roleRef:
 apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
 kind: ClusterRole
 name: system:coredns
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
 name: coredns
 namespace: kube-system
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
 name: coredns
 namespace: kube-system
data:
 Corefile: |
 .:53 {
 errors
 health {
 lameduck 5s
 }
 ready
 kubernetes cluster.local. 10.254.0.0/16 #这里指定的 apiserver 在启动时就使用--service-cluster-ip-range 定义的集群 server虚拟ip网段
 prometheus :9153
 forward . /etc/resolv.conf #这里指定的是 coredns的上级dns地址，，没有特殊需求可以直接使用当前本机的
 cache 30
 loop
 reload
 loadbalance
 }
EOF 1cat > coredns-app.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
 name: coredns
 namespace: kube-system
 labels:
 k8s-app: coredns
 kubernetes.io/name: "CoreDNS"
spec:
 replicas: 1
 selector:
 matchLabels:
 k8s-app: coredns
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 k8s-app: coredns
 spec:
 priorityClassName: system-cluster-critical
 serviceAccountName: coredns
 containers:
 - name: coredns
 image: harbor.od.com/public/coredns:1.6.1 #用于启动 coredns 的镜像
 args:
 - -conf
 - /etc/coredns/Corefile
 volumeMounts:
 - name: config-volume
 mountPath: /etc/coredns
 ports:
 - containerPort: 53
 name: dns
 protocol: UDP
 - containerPort: 53
 name: dns-tcp
 protocol: TCP
 - containerPort: 9153
 name: metrics
 protocol: TCP
 livenessProbe:
 httpGet:
 path: /health
 port: 8080
 scheme: HTTP
 initialDelaySeconds: 60
 timeoutSeconds: 5
 successThreshold: 1
 failureThreshold: 5
 dnsPolicy: Default
 volumes:
 - name: config-volume
 configMap:
 name: coredns
 items:
 - key: Corefile
 path: Corefile
EOF 1cat > coredns-svc.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
 name: coredns
 namespace: kube-system
 annotations:
 prometheus.io/port: "9153"
 prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
 labels:
 k8s-app: coredns
 kubernetes.io/cluster-service: "true"
 kubernetes.io/name: "CoreDNS"
spec:
 selector:
 k8s-app: coredns
 clusterIP: 10.254.0.2 # coredns 的service ip地址，对应了node kubelet在启动时 使用 --cluster-dns 定义的保持一致
 ports:
 - name: dns
 port: 53
 protocol: UDP
 - name: dns-tcp
 port: 53
 protocol: TCP
 - name: metrics
 port: 9153
 protocol: TCP
EOF 1kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/coredns/coredns-rbac-cm.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/coredns/coredns-app.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/coredns/coredns-svc.yaml 1nslookup nginx-ds.kube-public.svc.cluster.local 10.254.0.2
Server: 10.254.0.2
Address: 10.254.0.2#53

Name: nginx-ds.kube-public.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.254.0.229 测试 coredns1[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl create deployment nginx-test --image=nginx -n kube-public
deployment.apps/nginx-test created
[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get pods -n kube-public
NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE
nginx-ds-b9b4b5b97-kxz7x 1/1 Running 0 12h
nginx-test-65c98cd596-8tpxp 1/1 Running 0 10s
[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get pods -n kube-public -o wide
NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE IP NODE NOMINATED NODE READINESS GATES
nginx-ds-b9b4b5b97-kxz7x 1/1 Running 0 12h 172.7.22.2 k8s-22.host.com <none> <none>
nginx-test-65c98cd596-8tpxp 1/1 Running 0 15s 172.7.21.3 k8s-21.host.com <none> <none>
[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl expose deployment nginx-test --port=80 -n kube-public
service/nginx-test exposed
[root@k8s-21 ~]# kubectl get svc -n kube-public -o wide
NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE SELECTOR
nginx-ds ClusterIP 10.254.0.229 <none> 80/TCP 12h app=nginx-ds
nginx-test ClusterIP 10.254.133.128 <none> 80/TCP 7s app=nginx-test
[root@k8s-21 ~]# nslookup nginx-test.kube-public.svc.cluster.local 10.254.0.2
Server: 10.254.0.2
Address: 10.254.0.2#53

Name: nginx-test.kube-public.svc.cluster.local
Address: 10.254.133.128 故障排查你懂我的意思的吧～ image-20200624102817085 1pod日志排查
kubectl logs coredns-6c87bf5d98-mhltf -n kube-system Ingress 首先要将ingerss的镜像 traefik pull到本地仓库 k8s-200 1[root@k8s-200 traefik]#mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/traefik;cd /data/k8s-yaml/traefik 1cat > rbac.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 name: traefik-ingress-controller
 namespace: kube-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
 name: traefik-ingress-controller
rules:
 - apiGroups:
 - ""
 resources:
 - services
 - endpoints
 - secrets
 verbs:
 - get
 - list
 - watch
 - apiGroups:
 - extensions
 resources:
 - ingresses
 verbs:
 - get
 - list
 - watch
---
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: traefik-ingress-controller
roleRef:
 apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
 kind: ClusterRole
 name: traefik-ingress-controller
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
 name: traefik-ingress-controller
 namespace: kube-system
EOF 1cat > ds.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
 name: traefik-ingress
 namespace: kube-system
 labels:
 k8s-app: traefik-ingress
spec:
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 k8s-app: traefik-ingress
 name: traefik-ingress
 spec:
 serviceAccountName: traefik-ingress-controller
 terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
 containers:
 - image: harbor.od.com/public/traefik:v1.7.2
 name: traefik-ingress
 ports:
 - name: controller
 containerPort: 80
 hostPort: 81
 - name: admin-web
 containerPort: 8080
 securityContext:
 capabilities:
 drop:
 - ALL
 add:
 - NET_BIND_SERVICE
 args:
 - --api
 - --kubernetes
 - --logLevel=INFO
 - --insecureskipverify=true
 - --kubernetes.endpoint=https://10.10.10.10:7443
 - --accesslog
 - --accesslog.filepath=/var/log/traefik_access.log
 - --traefiklog
 - --traefiklog.filepath=/var/log/traefik.log
 - --metrics.prometheus
EOF 1cat > ingress.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
 name: traefik-web-ui
 namespace: kube-system
 annotations:
 kubernetes.io/ingress.class: traefik
spec:
 rules:
 - host: traefik.od.com
 http:
 paths:
 - path: /
 backend:
 serviceName: trae
EOF 1cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Service
apiVersion: v1
metadata:
 name: traefik-ingress-service
 namespace: kube-system
spec:
 selector:
 k8s-app: traefik-ingress
 ports:
 - protocol: TCP
 port: 80
 name: controller
 - protocol: TCP
 port: 8080
 name: admin-web
EOF k8s-21 k8s-22 1kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/traefik/rbac.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/traefik/ds.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/traefik/ingress.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/traefik/svc.yaml k8s-11 k8s-12 1upstream default_backend_traefik {
 server 10.10.10.21:81 max_fails=3 fail_timeout=10s;
 server 10.10.10.22:81 max_fails=3 fail_timeout=10s;
}
server {
 server_name *.od.com;

 location / {
 proxy_pass http://default_backend_traefik;
 proxy_set_header Host $http_host;
 proxy_set_header x-forwarded-for $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
 }
} 别忘记了解析域名 image-20200625011046828

posts.title: Kubernetes K8s的dashborad
posts.text:
kubernetes-dashboard部署dashborad k8s-200 准备镜像 创建dashborad 的资源配置清单 1mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/dashboard;cd /data/k8s-yaml/dashboard 1[root@k8s-200 dashboard]# cat > rbac.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 labels:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 addonmanager.kubernetes.io/mode: Reconcile
 name: kubernetes-dashboard-admin
 namespace: kube-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
 name: kubernetes-dashboard-admin
 namespace: kube-system
 labels:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 addonmanager.kubernetes.io/mode: Reconcile
roleRef:
 apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
 kind: ClusterRole
 name: cluster-admin
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
 name: kubernetes-dashboard-admin
 namespace: kube-system
EOF 1[root@k8s-200 dashboard]# cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
 name: kubernetes-dashboard
 namespace: kube-system
 labels:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 kubernetes.io/cluster-service: "true"
 addonmanager.kubernetes.io/mode: Reconcile
spec:
 selector:
 matchLabels:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 annotations:
 scheduler.alpha.kubernetes.io/critical-pod: ''
 spec:
 priorityClassName: system-cluster-critical
 containers:
 - name: kubernetes-dashboard
 image: harbor.od.com/public/dashboard:v1.8.3
 resources:
 limits:
 cpu: 100m
 memory: 300Mi
 requests:
 cpu: 50m
 memory: 100Mi
 ports:
 - containerPort: 8443
 protocol: TCP
 args:
 # PLATFORM-SPECIFIC ARGS HERE
 - --auto-generate-certificates
 volumeMounts:
 - name: tmp-volume
 mountPath: /tmp
 livenessProbe:
 httpGet:
 scheme: HTTPS
 path: /
 port: 8443
 initialDelaySeconds: 30
 timeoutSeconds: 30
 volumes:
 - name: tmp-volume
 emptyDir: {}
 serviceAccountName: kubernetes-dashboard-admin
 tolerations:
 - key: "CriticalAddonsOnly"
 operator: "Exists"
EOF 1[root@k8s-200 dashboard]# cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
 name: kubernetes-dashboard
 namespace: kube-system
 labels:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 kubernetes.io/cluster-service: "true"
 addonmanager.kubernetes.io/mode: Reconcile
spec:
 selector:
 k8s-app: kubernetes-dashboard
 ports:
 - port: 443
 targetPort: 8443
EOF 1[root@k8s-200 dashboard]# cat > ingress.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
 name: kubernetes-dashboard
 namespace: kube-system
 annotations:
 kubernetes.io/ingress.class: traefik
spec:
 rules:
 - host: dashborad.od.com
 http:
 paths:
 - backend:
 serviceName: kubernetes-dashboard
 servicePort: 443
EOF k8s-21 启动 12345kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dashboard/rbac.yamlkubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dashboard/dp.yamlkubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dashboard/svc.yamlkubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dashboard/ingress.yamlkubectl ge pods -n kube-system image-20200627003048506 Dashborad 配置httpsdashborad http不支持认证必须配置https证书 所以在 七层的 nginx负载上配置https 自签ssl证书仅作参考 1(umask 0077; openssl genrsa -out dashborad.od.com.key 2048)

openssl req -new -key dashborad.od.com.key -out dashborad.od.com.csr -subj "/CN=dashborad.od.com/C=CN/ST=BJ/L=Beijing/O=K8S-web/OU=ops"

openssl x509 -req -in dashborad.od.com.csr -CA ca.pem -CAkey ca-key.pem -out dashborad.od.com.crt -CAcreateserial -days 3650 配置nginx 1server {
 listen 80;
 server_name dashborad.od.com;
 rewrite ^(.*)$ https://${server_name}$1 permanent;
}
server {
 listen 443 ssl;
 server_name dashborad.od.com;

 ssl_certificate "certs/dashborad.od.com.crt";
 ssl_certificate_key "certs/dashborad.od.com.key";
 ssl_session_cache shared:SSL:1m;
 ssl_session_timeout 10m;
 ssl_ciphers HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5;
 ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;


 location / {
 proxy_pass http://default_backend_traefik;
 proxy_set_header Host $http_host;
 proxy_set_header x-forwarded-for $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
 }
} 获取名称空间中的 service-accout 列表 1kubectl get secret -n kube-system 详细查看， 并拿到token 1kubectl describe kubernetes-dashboard-admin-token-9jl9v -n kube-system kubernetes dashborad 的web界面就是使用 token登录的 image-20200627002910939 相关文档 dashborad images : https://github.com/kubernetes/dashboard/releases/tag k8s的rbac鉴权https://kubernetes.io/zh/docs/reference/access-authn-authz/rbac/ https://jimmysong.io/kubernetes-handbook/concepts/rbac.html dashborad 插件heapster heapster 已经多年没有更新，并且heapster的性能监控功能现在已经完全被 普罗米修斯 取代 准备镜像 https://github.com/kubernetes-retired/heapster/releases/tag/v1.5.4 k8s-200 1mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/heapster; cd /data/k8s-yaml/heapster 1[root@k8s-200 heapster]# cat > rbac.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 name: heapster
 namespace: kube-system
---
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: heapster
roleRef:
 apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
 kind: ClusterRole
 name: system:heapster
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
 name: heapster
 namespace: kube-system
EOF 1[root@k8s-200 heapster]# cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
 name: heapster
 namespace: kube-system
spec:
 replicas: 1
 template:
 metadata:
 labels:
 task: monitoring
 k8s-app: heapster
 spec:
 serviceAccountName: heapster
 containers:
 - name: heapster
 image: harbor.od.com/public/heapster:v1.5.4
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 command:
 - /heapster
 - --source=kubernetes:https://kubernetes.default
EOF 1[root@k8s-200 heapster]# cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
 labels:
 task: monitoring
 # For use as a Cluster add-on (https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/tree/master/cluster/addons)
 # If you are NOT using this as an addon, you should comment out this line.
 kubernetes.io/cluster-service: 'true'
 kubernetes.io/name: Heapster
 name: heapster
 namespace: kube-system
spec:
 ports:
 - port: 80
 targetPort: 8082
 selector:
 k8s-app: heapster
EOF k8s-21 1kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/heapster/rbac.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/heapster/dp.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/heapster/svc.yaml image-20200627050130438

posts.title: Kubernetes K8s微服务实战
posts.text:
k8s实战架构图 image-20200627182732619 安装zookeeper k8s-11 k8s-12 k8s-21 配置jdk环境1cd /opt/src/ 1wget https://file.ipython.run:20443/Linux/java/jdk-8u221-linux-x64.tar.gz

mkdir /usr/java/
tar xf jdk-8u221-linux-x64.tar.gz -C /usr/java/

ln -s /usr/java/jdk1.8.0_221 /usr/java/jdk 1vim /etc/profile

export JAVA_HOME=/usr/java/jdk
export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH
export CLASSPATH=$CLASSPATH:$JAVA_HOME/lib:$JAVA_HOME/lib/tools.jar 1source /etc/profile

~]# java -version
java version "1.8.0_221"
Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 1.8.0_221-b11)
Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM (build 25.221-b11, mixed mode) 安装zookper1cd /opt/src 1wget https://file.ipython.run:20443/Linux/zookeeper/zookeeper-3.4.14.tar.gz


tar -xf zookeeper-3.4.14.tar.gz -C /opt/
ln -s /opt/zookeeper-3.4.14/ /opt/zookeeper

mkdir /data/zookeeper/data /data/zookeeper/logs 1cat > /opt/zookeeper/conf/zoo.cfg <<-EOF
tickTime=2000
initLimit=10
syncLimit=5
dataDir=/data/zookeeper/data
dataLogDir=/data/zookeeper/logs
clientPort=2181
server.1=zk1.od.com:2888:3888
server.2=zk2.od.com:2888:3888
server.3=zk3.od.com:2888:3888
EOF 别忘记配置 bind9 1在 zookeeper 集群上的3台主机上分别定义一个id
echo 1 > /data/zookeeper/data/myid #k8s-11
echo 2 > /data/zookeeper/data/myid #k8s-12
echo 3 > /data/zookeeper/data/myid #k8s-21 启动zookeeper 1/opt/zookeeper/bin/zkServer.sh start
opt]# /opt/zookeeper/bin/zkServer.sh status
ZooKeeper JMX enabled by default
Using config: /opt/zookeeper/bin/../conf/zoo.cfg
Mode: follower 部署Jenkins 到k8s部署nfs服务jenkins的构建文件是需要保留的，所以需要使用到共享存储，这里选用nfs 全部节点安装 nfs-utils k8s-200 1cat > /etc/exports <<-EOF
/data/nfs_volume 10.10.10.0/24(rw,no_root_squash)
EOF 1systemctl start nfs

 ~]# showmount -e 10.10.10.200
Export list for 10.10.10.200:
/data/nfs_volume 10.10.10.0/24 准备jenkins镜像1docker pull jenkins/jenkins:2.190.3
docker tag 22b8b9a84dbe harbor.od.com/public/jenkins:v2.190.3 123456789101112131415161718192021mkidr jenkins;cd jenkins jenkins]# cat > Dockerfile <<-EOFFROM harbor.od.com/public/jenkins:v2.190.3USER rootRUN /bin/cp /usr/share/zoneinfo/Asia/Shanghai /etc/localtime && echo "Asia/Shanghai" > /etc/timezoneADD id_rsa /root/.ssh/id_rsaADD config.json /root/.docker/config.jsonADD get-docker.sh /get-docker.shRUN echo " StrictHostKeyChecking no" >> /etc/ssh/ssh_configRUN /get-docker.shEOFconfig.json 文件为 docker harbor仓库的认证文件get-docker.sh 是从 get.docker.com curl下来的安装docker client安装脚本 现在 harbor上创建一个infra 私有仓库 1docker build . -t harbor.od.com/infra/jenkins:v2.190.3 托管到k8s 在k8s上创建一个infra名称空间 1kubectl create ns infra 在infra创建一个secret 为docker-registry类型 由于jenkins 放在似有仓库中， k8s再拉去镜像时需要想harbor认证，不然三拉不下来的 1kubectl create secret docker-registry harbor --docker-server=harbor.od.com --docker-username=admin --docker-password=Harbor12345 -n infra



docker-resitry		指定为docker-registr类型
harbor				这个密钥的名字
--docker-username	harbor的用户名
--docker-password	harbor的密码 准备资源配置清单 1cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Deployment
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: jenkins
 namespace: infra
 labels: 
 name: jenkins
spec:
 replicas: 1
 selector:
 matchLabels: 
 name: jenkins
 template:
 metadata:
 labels: 
 app: jenkins 
 name: jenkins
 spec:
 volumes:
 - name: data
 nfs: 
 server: k8s-200
 path: /data/nfs_volume/jenkins_home
 - name: docker
 hostPath: 
 path: /run/docker.sock 
 type: ''
 containers:
 - name: jenkins
 image: harbor.od.com/infra/jenkins:v2.190.3
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent 
 ports:
 - containerPort: 8080
 protocol: TCP
 env:
 - name: JAVA_OPTS
 value: -Xmx512m -Xms512m
 volumeMounts:
 - name: data
 mountPath: /var/jenkins_home
 - name: docker
 mountPath: /run/docker.sock
 imagePullSecrets:
 - name: harbor
 securityContext: 
 runAsUser: 0
 strategy:
 type: RollingUpdate
 rollingUpdate: 
 maxUnavailable: 1
 maxSurge: 1
 revisionHistoryLimit: 7
 progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
EOF 1cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Service
apiVersion: v1
metadata: 
 name: jenkins
 namespace: infra
spec:
 ports:
 - protocol: TCP
 port: 80
 targetPort: 8080
 selector:
 app: jenkins
EOF 1cat > ingrees.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Ingress
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata: 
 name: jenkins
 namespace: infra
spec:
 rules:
 - host: jenkins.od.com
 http:
 paths:
 - path: /
 backend: 
 serviceName: jenkins
 servicePort: 80
EOF 启动jenkins 1kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/jenkins/dp.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/jenkins/svc.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/jenkins/ingrees.yaml jenkins启动较慢 启动成功后 安装 Blue Ocean 插件 image-20200630105212206 为jenkins安装Maven1cd /opt/src/
wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.6.1/binaries/apache-maven-3.6.1-bin.tar.gz 1tar -xf apache-maven-3.6.1-bin.tar.gz -C /data/nfs_volume/jenkins_home/
mv apache-maven-3.6.1 maven-3.6.1-8u232 给maven 配置国内源 1cd /data/nfs_volume/jenkins_home/maven-3.6.1-8u232/conf

vim settings.xml
 <mirrors>
 <mirror>
 <id>nexus-aliyun</id>
 <mirrorOf>central</mirrorOf>
 <name>Nexus aliyun</name>
 <url>http://maven.aliyun.com/nexus/content/groups/public</url>
 </mirror>
 </mirrors> 1root@jenkins-d69ddffd8-fdrww:/var/jenkins_home/maven-3.6.1-8u232/bin# ./mvn -version
Apache Maven 3.6.1 (d66c9c0b3152b2e69ee9bac180bb8fcc8e6af555; 2019-04-05T03:00:29+08:00)
Maven home: /var/jenkins_home/maven-3.6.1-8u232
Java version: 1.8.0_232, vendor: Oracle Corporation, runtime: /usr/local/openjdk-8/jre
Default locale: en, platform encoding: UTF-8
OS name: "linux", version: "4.4.227-1.el7.elrepo.x86_64", arch: "amd64", family: "unix" dubbo 微服务准备基础的jre环境1docker pull stanleyws/jre8:8u112
docker tag fa3a085d6ef1 harbor.od.com/public/jre:8u112
docker push harbor.od.com/public/jre:8u112 1mkdir /dat/Dockerfile/jre8
cd !$ 制作Dockerfile 1cat > Dockerfile <<-EOF
FROM harbor.od.com/public/jre:8u112
RUN /bin/cp /usr/share/zoneinfo/Asia/Shanghai /etc/localtime &&\
 echo 'Asia/Shanghai' >/etc/timezone
ADD config.yml /opt/prom/config.yml
ADD jmx_javaagent-0.3.1.jar /opt/prom/
WORKDIR /opt/project_dir
ADD entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
CMD ["/entrypoint.sh"]
EOF 后期普罗米修斯监控需要用到的配置文件 1cat > config.yml <<-EOF
--- 
rules: 
 - pattern: '.*'
EOF 普罗米修斯采集jvm信息的一个 jar包 1wget https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/io/prometheus/jmx/jmx_prometheus_javaagent/0.3.1/jmx_prometheus_javaagent-0.3.1.jar -O jmx_javaagent-0.3.1.jar 启动脚本 1cat > entrypoint.sh <<-EOF
#!/bin/sh
M_OPTS="-Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai -javaagent:/opt/prom/jmx_javaagent-0.3.1.jar=$(hostname -i):${M_PORT:-"12346"}:/opt/prom/config.yml"
C_OPTS=${C_OPTS}
JAR_BALL=${JAR_BALL}
exec java -jar ${M_OPTS} ${C_OPTS} ${JAR_BALL}
EOF build 事先要在 harbor中创建 base 公开仓库 1docker build . -t harbor.od.com/base/jre8:8u112
docker push harbor.od.com/base/jre8:8u112 配置jenkins构建dubbo微服务 jenkins.od.com_job_dubbo-demo_configure 流水线剧本 1pipeline {
 agent any 
 stages {
 stage('pull') { //get project code from repo 
 steps {
 sh "git clone ${params.git_repo} ${params.app_name}/${env.BUILD_NUMBER} && cd ${params.app_name}/${env.BUILD_NUMBER} && git checkout ${params.git_ver}"
 }
 }
 stage('build') { //exec mvn cmd
 steps {
 sh "cd ${params.app_name}/${env.BUILD_NUMBER} && /var/jenkins_home/maven-${params.maven}/bin/${params.mvn_cmd}"
 }
 }
 stage('package') { //move jar file into project_dir
 steps {
 sh "cd ${params.app_name}/${env.BUILD_NUMBER} && cd ${params.target_dir} && mkdir project_dir && mv *.jar ./project_dir"
 }
 }
 stage('image') { //build image and push to registry
 steps {
 writeFile file: "${params.app_name}/${env.BUILD_NUMBER}/Dockerfile", text: """FROM harbor.od.com/${params.base_image}
ADD ${params.target_dir}/project_dir /opt/project_dir"""
 sh "cd ${params.app_name}/${env.BUILD_NUMBER} && docker build -t harbor.od.com/${params.image_name}:${params.git_ver}_${params.add_tag} . && docker push harbor.od.com/${params.image_name}:${params.git_ver}_${params.add_tag}"
 }
 }
 }
} 构建dubbo-demo-server 项目地址: https://github.com/Meleuo/dubbo-demo-service.git image-20200701180040552 image-20200701110118012 dubbo-demo-server托管到k8s1mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/dubbo-demo-service/
cd !$ 1cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Deployment
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: dubbo-demo-service
 namespace: app
 labels: 
 name: dubbo-demo-service
spec:
 replicas: 1
 selector:
 matchLabels: 
 name: dubbo-demo-service
 template:
 metadata:
 labels: 
 app: dubbo-demo-service
 name: dubbo-demo-service
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: dubbo-demo-service
 image: harbor.od.com/app/dubbo-demo-service:master_200701_0000
 ports:
 - containerPort: 20880
 protocol: TCP
 env:
 - name: JAR_BALL
 value: dubbo-server.jar
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 imagePullSecrets:
 - name: harbor
 restartPolicy: Always
 terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
 securityContext: 
 runAsUser: 0
 schedulerName: default-scheduler
 strategy:
 type: RollingUpdate
 rollingUpdate: 
 maxUnavailable: 1
 maxSurge: 1
 revisionHistoryLimit: 7
 progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
EOF 需要创建app 名称空间 在app名称空间中添加一个secret dubbo的镜像放在似有仓库中， so， 需要配置对于harbor的认证 1kubectl create secret docker-registry harbor --docker-server=harbor.od.com --docker-username=admin --docker-password=Harbor12345 启动dubbo 1kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-demo-service/dp.yaml image-20200701113347745 dubbo-monitordubbo-monitor 是一款用来监控dubbo服务的程序 https://github.com/Jeromefromcn/dubbo-monitor 1cd /opt/src

git clone https://github.com/Jeromefromcn/dubbo-monitor.git
cd dubbo-monitor/dubbo-monitor-simple/conf 修改dubbo-monitor 启动参数 1cat > dubbo_origin.properties <<-EOF
dubbo.container=log4j,spring,registry,jetty
dubbo.application.name=dubbo-monitor
dubbo.application.owner=dubbo-monitor-owner
dubbo.registry.address=zookeeper://zk1.od.com:2181?backup=zk2.od.com:2181,zk3.od.com:2181
dubbo.protocol.port=7070
dubbo.jetty.port=18081
dubbo.jetty.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/monitor
dubbo.charts.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/charts
dubbo.statistics.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/monitor/statistics
dubbo.log4j.file=logs/dubbo-monitor-simple.log
dubbo.log4j.level=WARN
EOF 修改dubbo-monitor启动脚本 1cd /opt/src/dubbo-monitor/dubbo-monitor-simple/bin
vim start.sh

JAVA_MEM_OPTS=" -server -Xmx128m -Xms128m -Xmn32m -XX:PermSize=16m -Xss256k -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+UseConcMarkSweepGC -XX:+CMSParallelRemarkEnabled -XX:+UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection -XX:LargePageSizeInBytes=128m -XX:+UseFastAccessorMethods -XX:+UseCMSInitiatingOccupancyOnly -XX:CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction=70 "
else
JAVA_MEM_OPTS=" -server -Xms128m -Xmx128m -XX:PermSize=16m -XX:SurvivorRatio=2 -XX:+UseParallelGC "

exec java $JAVA_OPTS $JAVA_MEM_OPTS $JAVA_DEBUG_OPTS $JAVA_JMX_OPTS -classpath $CONF_DIR:$LIB_JARS com.alibaba.dubbo.container.Main > $STDOUT_FILE 2>&1 将配置好的duboo-monitor打包为镜像 1cd /opt/src
cp -a dubbo-monitor /data/Dockerfile
cd /data/Dockerfile/dubbo-monitor

docker build . -t harbor.od.com/infra/dubbo-monitor:latest
docker push harbor.od.com/infra/dubbo-monitor:latest 交付到k8s中 1mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/dubbo-monitor/
cd /data/k8s-yaml/dubbo-monitor/ 1cat > cm.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
 name: dubbo-monitor-cm
 namespace: infra
data:
 dubbo.properties: |
 dubbo.container=log4j,spring,registry,jetty
 dubbo.application.name=simple-monitor
 dubbo.application.owner=simple-moitor-owner
 dubbo.registry.address=zookeeper://zk1.od.com:2181?backup=zk2.od.com:2181,zk3.od.com:2181
 dubbo.protocol.port=20880
 dubbo.jetty.port=8080
 dubbo.jetty.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/monitor
 dubbo.charts.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/charts
 dubbo.statistics.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/statistics
 dubbo.log4j.file=/dubbo-monitor-simple/logs/dubbo-monitor.log
 dubbo.log4j.level=WARN
EOF 1cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Deployment
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: dubbo-monitor
 namespace: infra
 labels: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
spec:
 replicas: 1
 selector:
 matchLabels: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
 template:
 metadata:
 labels: 
 app: dubbo-monitor
 name: dubbo-monitor
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: dubbo-monitor
 image: harbor.od.com/infra/dubbo-monitor:latest
 ports:
 - containerPort: 7070
 protocol: TCP
 - containerPort: 18081
 protocol: TCP
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 imagePullSecrets:
 - name: harbor
 restartPolicy: Always
 terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
 securityContext: 
 runAsUser: 0
 schedulerName: default-scheduler
 strategy:
 type: RollingUpdate
 rollingUpdate: 
 maxUnavailable: 1
 maxSurge: 1
 revisionHistoryLimit: 7
 progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
EOF 1cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Service
apiVersion: v1
metadata: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
 namespace: infra
spec:
 ports:
 - protocol: TCP
 port: 8080
 targetPort: 18081
 selector: 
 app: dubbo-monitor
EOF 1cat > ingress.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Ingress
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
 namespace: infra
spec:
 rules:
 - host: dubbo-monitor.od.com
 http:
 paths:
 - path: /
 backend: 
 serviceName: dubbo-monitor
 servicePort: 8080
EOF 1kubelet apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-monitor/dp.yaml
kubelet apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-monitor/svc.yaml
kubelet apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-monitor/ingress.yaml image-20200701145316044 构建dubbo-demo-consumer 项目地址： `git@github.com:Meleuo/dubbo-demo-web.git` image-20200701180010671 image-20200701175952223 dubbo-demo-consumer托管到k8s1mkdir /data/k8s-yaml/dubbo-demo-consumer
cd !$ 1cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Deployment
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: dubbo-demo-consumer
 namespace: app
 labels: 
 name: dubbo-demo-consumer
spec:
 replicas: 1
 selector:
 matchLabels: 
 name: dubbo-demo-consumer
 template:
 metadata:
 labels: 
 app: dubbo-demo-consumer
 name: dubbo-demo-consumer
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: dubbo-demo-consumer
 image: harbor.od.com/app/dubbo-demo-consumer:master_200701_0424
 ports:
 - containerPort: 8080
 protocol: TCP
 - containerPort: 20880
 protocol: TCP
 env:
 - name: JAR_BALL
 value: dubbo-client.jar
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 imagePullSecrets:
 - name: harbor
 restartPolicy: Always
 terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
 securityContext: 
 runAsUser: 0
 schedulerName: default-scheduler
 strategy:

 maxSurge: 1

 progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
EOF 1cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Service
apiVersion: v1
metadata:

 namespace: app
spec:

 - protocol: TCP
 port: 8080
 targetPort: 8080

EOF 1cat > ingress.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Ingress
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata:

 namespace: app
spec:
 rules:
 - host: demo.od.com
 http:

kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-demo-consumer/svc.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-demo-consumer/ingress.yaml dubbo-demo改版 过程新代码提交到Git –> Jenkins 打包 –> 在dashborad修改deployment的镜像源 –>k8s启动新容器

posts.title: Kubernetes K8s配置中心
posts.text:
配置中心 在不同的环境下上不同的应用 K8S ConfigMap K8S 自带的配置管理工具，将程序的参数文件抽象为统一资源配置清单 将上节课dubbo* 的pod数量都改成0 1cd /data/k8s-yaml/dubbo-monitor 1cat > cm.yaml <<-EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
 name: dubbo-monitor-cm
 namespace: infra
data:
 dubbo.properties: |
 dubbo.container=log4j,spring,registry,jetty
 dubbo.application.name=simple-monitor
 dubbo.application.owner=simple-moitor-owner
 dubbo.registry.address=zookeeper://zk2.od.com:2181
 dubbo.protocol.port=20880
 dubbo.jetty.port=8080
 dubbo.jetty.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/monitor
 dubbo.charts.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/charts
 dubbo.statistics.directory=/dubbo-monitor-simple/statistics
 dubbo.log4j.file=/dubbo-monitor-simple/logs/dubbo-monitor.log
 dubbo.log4j.level=WARN
EOF 1cat > dp.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Deployment
apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
metadata:
 name: dubbo-monitor
 namespace: infra
 labels: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
spec:
 replicas: 1
 selector:
 matchLabels: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
 template:
 metadata:
 labels: 
 app: dubbo-monitor
 name: dubbo-monitor
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: dubbo-monitor
 image: harbor.od.com/infra/dubbo-monitor:latest
 ports:
 - containerPort: 8080
 protocol: TCP
 - containerPort: 20880
 protocol: TCP
 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
 volumeMounts:
 - name: configmap-volume
 mountPath: /dubbo-monitor-simple/conf
 volumes:
 - name: configmap-volume
 configMap:
 name: dubbo-monitor-cm
 imagePullSecrets:
 - name: harbor
 restartPolicy: Always
 terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
 securityContext: 
 runAsUser: 0
 schedulerName: default-scheduler
 strategy:
 type: RollingUpdate
 rollingUpdate: 
 maxUnavailable: 1
 maxSurge: 1
 revisionHistoryLimit: 7
 progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
EOF 1cat > svc.yaml <<-EOF
kind: Service
apiVersion: v1
metadata: 
 name: dubbo-monitor
 namespace: infra
spec:
 ports:
 - protocol: TCP
 port: 8080
 targetPort: 8080
 selector: 
 app: dubbo-monitor
EOF 1kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-monitor/cm.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-monitor/dp.yaml
kubectl apply -f http://k8s-yaml.od.com/dubbo-monitor/svc.yaml image-20200702104827973 Apollo image-20200702161056597 https://github.com/ctripcorp/apollo 部署Apollo ConfigServiceapollo 本身也是微服务架构的，注册中心正是 apollo-configserver 部署数据库 apollo的数据是存储在关系型数据库中的，因此，需要准备一个Mariadb/MySQL k8s-11 1cat > /etc/yum.repo.d/mariadb.repo <<-EOF
[mariadb]
name = MariaDB
baseurl = https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/mariadb/yum/10.2/centos7-amd64
gpgkey=https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/mariadb/yum/RPM-GPG-KEY-MariaDB
gpgcheck=0
EOF 1yum clean all
yum install mariadb-server mariadb 修改数据库字符集为utf-81vim /etc/my.cnf.d/mysql-clients.cnf 
[mysql]
default-character-set = utf8mb4


vim /etc/my.cnf.d/server.cnf 
[mysqld]
character_set_server = utf8mb4
collation_server = utf8mb4_general_ci
init_connect = "SET NAMES 'utf8mb4'" 1mysql_secure_installation 准备ApolloConfigServer数据库 https://github.com/ctripcorp/apollo/tree/1.5.1/scripts/db/migration/configdb 恢复初始化数据库，从官方那里拿来sql文件 1wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ctripcorp/apollo/1.5.1/scripts/db/migration/configdb/V1.0.0__initialization.sql

mysql -u root -p < V1.0.0__initialization.sql 创建sql用户 123grant INSERT,DELETE,UPDATE,SELECT on ApolloConfigDB.* to 'apolloconfig'@'10.10.10.%' identified by "123456";10.10.10.% 授权k8s集群物理机的ip段访问 修改初始化数据 官方给的 sql中 配置中心 默认的url地址是无法使用的，需要修改为实际运行的url，域名绑定的 1update ServerConfig set Value='http://config.od.com/eureka' where Id=1; 不要忘记域名解析， 这个域名应该对应 keepalive负载均衡的虚拟IP 部署ApolloConfigServer https://github.com/ctripcorp/apollo/tags k8s-200 1cd /opt/src 1wget https://github.com/ctripcorp/apollo/releases/download/v1.5.1/apollo-configservice-1.5.1-github.zip

mkdir /data/dockerfile/apollo-configservice
unzip apollo-configservice-1.5.1-github.zip -d /data/dockerfile/apollo-configservice 修改数据库连接参数 不需要做，实际上这些参数在下文使用 k8s ConfigMap配置 1cd /data/dockerfile/apollo-configservice/config

cat > application-github.properties <<-EOF
# DataSource
spring.datasource.url = jdbc:mysql://mysql.od.com:3306/ApolloConfigDB?characterEncoding=utf8
spring.datasource.username = apolloconfig
spring.datasource.password = 123456


#apollo.eureka.server.enabled=true
#apollo.eureka.client.enabled=true
EOF 修改启动脚本 默认的启动脚本并不是为了在Docker运行准备的，不过Apollo 官方提供了Docker下的启动脚本 https://github.com/ctripcorp/apollo/tree/master/scripts/apollo-on-kubernetes/apollo-config-server/scripts 1cd /data/Dockerfile/apollo-configservice/scripts
vim startup.sh
#!/bin/bash
SERVICE_NAME=apollo-configservice
## Adjust log dir if necessary
LOG_DIR=/opt/logs/apollo-config-server
## Adjust server port if necessary
SERVER_PORT=8080

SERVER_URL="http://${APOLLO_CONFIG_SERVICE_NAME}:${SERVER_PORT}"
APOLLO_CONFIG_SERVICE_NAME=$(hostname -i) 
## Adjust memory settings if necessary
export JAVA_OPTS="-Xms128m -Xmx128m -Xss256k -XX:MetaspaceSize=128m -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=384m -XX:NewSize=256m -XX:MaxNewSize=256m -XX:SurvivorRatio=8"

## Only uncomment the following when you are using server jvm
#export JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -server -XX:-ReduceInitialCardMarks"

########### The following is the same for configservice, adminservice, portal ###########
export JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -XX:ParallelGCThreads=4 -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=9 -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+ScavengeBeforeFullGC -XX:SoftRefLRUPolicyMSPerMB=0 -XX:+ExplicitGCInvokesConcurrent -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai -Dclient.encoding.override=UTF-8 -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 -Djava.security.egd=file:/dev/./urandom"
export JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -Dserver.port=$SERVER_PORT -Dlogging.file=$LOG_DIR/$SERVICE_NAME.log -XX:HeapDumpPath=$LOG_DIR/HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError/"

# Find Java
if [[ -n "$JAVA_HOME" ]] && [[ -x "$JAVA_HOME/bin/java" ]]; then
 javaexe="$JAVA_HOME/bin/java"
elif type -p java > /dev/null 2>&1; then
 javaexe=$(type -p java)
elif [[ -x "/usr/bin/java" ]]; then
 javaexe="/usr/bin/java"
else
 echo "Unable to find Java"
 exit 1
fi

if [[ "$javaexe" ]]; then
 version=$("$javaexe" -version 2>&1 | awk -F '"' '/version/ {print $2}')
 version=$(echo "$version" | awk -F. '{printf("%03d%03d",$1,$2);}')
 # now version is of format 009003 (9.3.x)
 if [ $version -ge 011000 ]; then
 JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -Xlog:gc*:$LOG_DIR/gc.log:time,level,tags -Xlog:safepoint -Xlog:gc+heap=trace"
 elif [ $version -ge 010000 ]; then
 JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -Xlog:gc*:$LOG_DIR/gc.log:time,level,tags -Xlog:safepoint -Xlog:gc+heap=trace"
 elif [ $version -ge 009000 ]; then
 JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -Xlog:gc*:$LOG_DIR/gc.log:time,level,tags -Xlog:safepoint -Xlog:gc+heap=trace"
 else
 JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -XX:+UseParNewGC"
 JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -Xloggc:$LOG_DIR/gc.log -XX:+PrintGCDetails"
 JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -XX:+UseConcMarkSweepGC -XX:+UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection -XX:+UseCMSInitiatingOccupancyOnly -XX:CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction=60 -XX:+CMSClassUnloadingEnabled -XX:+CMSParallelRemarkEnabled -XX:CMSFullGCsBeforeCompaction=9 -XX:+CMSClassUnloadingEnabled -XX:+PrintGCDateStamps -XX:+PrintGCApplicationConcurrentTime -XX:+PrintHeapAtGC -XX:+UseGCLogFileRotation -XX:NumberOfGCLogFiles=5 -XX:GCLogFileSize=5M"
 fi
fi

printf "$(date) ==== Starting ==== \n"

cd `dirname $0`/..
chmod 755 $SERVICE_NAME".jar"
./$SERVICE_NAME".jar" start

rc=$?;

if [[ $rc != 0 ]];
then
 echo "$(date) Failed to start $SERVICE_NAME.jar, return code: $rc"
 exit $rc;
fi

tail -f /dev/null Docker File 1cd /data/Dockerfile/apollo-configservice
